action_boundary: Should the payment to Delta Services LLC use the attached ownership letter?
communication_boundary: Exact legal entity binding controls; identical names alone are not sufficient.

documents.text: Payment request PAY-DELTA-006 asks to release USD 38700 to Delta Services LLC for invoice INV-DELTA-006.
Vendor master VM-DELTA-006 lists Delta Services LLC, Delaware registration DE-40311, account ending 8813.
Bank ownership letter OWN-DELTA-006 states account ending 8813 belongs to Delta Services LLC, Delaware registration DE-40311.
Invoice INV-DELTA-006 names Delta Services LLC and Delaware registration DE-40311.
Vendor-bank payment requires matching legal name and registration ID across vendor master, invoice, and bank ownership evidence.
